items.title: Expressions and evaluation: correct the failure model
items.prompt: Which statement correctly resolves this documented beginner mistake? Expressions are always evaluated strictly from left to right, regardless of parentheses or operator precedence.

examEligibility.rationale: The deterministic answer and rubric are AI-assisted draft content awaiting independent human approval.

hints: Compare both options with the canonical model, declared boundary, and observable evidence in the lesson.

feedback.correct: Correct. Trace the syntax tree or explicit grouping, evaluate inner and higher-precedence operations first, and apply the runtime's documented order and type rules.
feedback.incorrect: The selected statement preserves the documented misconception. Trace the syntax tree or explicit grouping, evaluate inner and higher-precedence operations first, and apply the runtime's documented order and type rules.
